prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科主榜2026年约第21名，近年排名稳定在Top20左右，学校层次顶尖；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，涉及学术不端与师德师风事件（生命科学学院论文数据造假等），可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏高；2022年曾在河南出现投档线断档，但近年已恢复；化学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、数学A+、统计学A、物理学A、生物学A、中国语言文学A等14个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度从高热推荐降至推荐，电子信息/通信高热推荐，临床医学推荐，金融/财经/经济分化观望；云南省2026年高考总人数约377,900人，较2025年（约285,688人）大幅增加约32%，物理类考生估算从约17.3万增至约22.9万，竞争显著加剧；南开大学位于天津，非本省高校，在云南省招生占比约2%-3%，属跨省招生；天津作为直辖市对西南地区考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年小幅缩招（-2.2%）、考生总数大幅增加约32%带来的竞争加剧、声誉负面信号的轻微抑制，以及学校顶尖层次对高分考生的持续吸引力，在2025年基准1698名基础上预计位次继续小幅上移；预测最低位次约1706名，区间1511–1901名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 1000 → 1324 → 1434 → 1506 → 1698, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 698 positions in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 1698. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 47 in 2021 → 48 in 2022 → 49 in 2023 → 49 in 2024 → 46 in 2025 → 45 in 2026, with a reduction of 1 student in 2026 compared to 2025 (about -2.2%). This slight reduction theoretically eases competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 21st on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with a stable position around the top 20 in recent years, indicating a top-tier school level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents (such as data fabrication in papers from the School of Life Sciences), which may somewhat suppress application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with medium to high short video exposure. In 2022, there was a cutoff line gap in Henan, but it has recovered in recent years. It has 14 A- or above disciplines, including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, Physics A, Biology A, and Chinese Language and Literature A, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science popularity has dropped from high recommendation to recommendation, electronic information/communication is highly recommended, clinical medicine is recommended, and finance/banking/economics are divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 285,688). The estimated number of physics category examinees increases from about 173,000 to about 229,000, significantly intensifying competition. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university in the province, with an enrollment share of about 2%-3% in Yunnan Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. As a municipality directly under the central government, Tianjin has a certain appeal to candidates from the southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-2.2%), the intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 32% in total examinees, the slight suppression from negative reputation signals, and the sustained attraction of the top-tier school to high-scoring candidates, the ranking is expected to continue to shift slightly upward based on the 2025 baseline of 1698. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1706, with a range of 1511 to 1901.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1511), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group fluctuated significantly: approximately 235 → 262 → 347 → 266 → 369, with a baseline of about 369 in 2025. The provincial liberal arts group enrollment plan changed from 24 in 2021 to 21 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 29 in 2025, and 21 in 2026, representing a substantial reduction of 8 students (about -27.6%) from 2025 to 2026. This significant reduction theoretically eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 21st on the Soft Science main list in 2026. It has a strong liberal arts foundation, with leading national advantages in economics, history, and literature. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving academic misconduct and teacher ethics incidents, which may somewhat suppress application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with moderately high attention. It has A+ in Business Administration and Applied Economics, A in Chinese Language and Literature, World History, Chinese History, Theoretical Economics, Political Science, and Marxist Theory, among many other A- and above disciplines in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, Teacher Training/Education is wait-and-see, Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is wait-and-see. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, not a local university, with cross-provincial enrollment accounting for about 2%-3%, but it has strong appeal to liberal arts students in the Southwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings, the easing effect of the significant enrollment reduction (-27.6%) in 2026, the intensified competition from a roughly 32% increase in total examinees, the slight suppression from negative reputation signals, and the sustained attraction of top-tier liberal arts strength to high-scoring students, the ranking is expected to rise slightly from the 2025 baseline of 369. The predicted minimum ranking is about 348, with a range of 298 to 398.
